item.title: MegaSurvey move: TGS agrees key Wesrt Africa seismic deal
item.description: Contractor will harmonise Equatorial Guinea seismic data to de-risk subsurface

item.title: Seplat chief executive to step down next month
item.description: Roger Brown helmed Nigerian independent during its challenging acquisition of ExxonMobil's assets

item.title: German player continues to sell down stake in Harbour Energy
item.description: BASF initially had a 47% shareholding following Wintershall Dea acquisition

item.title: EnQuest eyes $800 million boost to Malaysia portfolio
item.description: UK independent's proposed deal enhances its strategic partnership with national upstream company Petronas Carigali

item.title: Chevron is steering crude flows to Asia and Europe amid Middle East war: CFO
item.description: About 5% of Chevron's global production is impacted, according to Eimear Bonner

item.title: Two-horse race for New Zealand LNG project
item.description: Government progressing liquefied natural gas import scheme to boost energy security

item.title: Samsung Heavy Industries in direct talks for two more FLNG vessels
item.description: South Korean heavyweight already awarded first liquefaction facility for Delfin LNG

item.title: PV Drilling acquires jack-up rig to meet ‘regional drilling demand’
item.description: Vietnamese contractor expects rising domestic and international exploration activity

item.title: Inpex moves to halt escalating strike action at Ichthys LNG project
item.description: Workers have already downed tools at 9.3 million tonnes per annum Australian liquefied natural gas project

item.title: Oil prices fall after Trump says deal with Iran is days away
item.description: Trump told the press talks to end the war could be signed by both sides 'in two or three days'

item.title: Shell-operated well offshore Namibia finds ‘encouraging’ results
item.description: UK supermajor says Merlin-1X well in Orange basin delivered ‘the most promising subsurface results to date’ in PEL 39

item.title: 'Most promising subsurface results to date': Shell delivers offshore Namibia
item.description: UK supermajor comes up trumps with Merlin-1X well in Orange basin PEL 39

item.title: New gas pipeline ready to feed US LNG project
item.description: Sempra's Louisiana Connector line now 'placed in-service'

item.title: Halliburton wins contract to support operations in Argentina’s Vaca Muerta
item.description: Pampa Energia aims to increase production by up to 45,000 bpd by 2027

item.title: Hyundai Engineering reinstated for major Kazakhstan EPC contract
item.description: South Korean player set to build a long-awaited raw gas processing plant for Karachaganak oilfield

item.title: BP announces corporate restructuring
item.description: UK supermajor reorganising from three to two primary business divisions with separate leadership structures

item.title: No investment confidence in North Sea, says BP's UK chief
item.description: BP has been in talks to divest its UK North Sea assets

item.title: Shell to assist Kazakhstan in developing geoscience platform
item.description: Astana hopes to follow Norway, UK, Australia and Brazil in developing large integrated geological datasets

item.title: Norway independent weighs up sale options
item.description: Lime Petroleum looking to offload Benin business, and has received offers for Norway assets

item.title: New contract and name for large deepwater rig
item.description: Noble Greatwhite will work in the UK North Sea before assignment in Norway

item.title: Oil flowing again from West Africa FPSO
item.description: Baobab field offshore Ivory Coast back on stream after floater's refurbishment

item.title: Angola-focused player eyes exploration success as independent status secured
item.description: Dramatic market changes in 2026 meant Afentra could raise finance to invest in Angola E&P activities

item.title: Afentra eyes Angola exploration push after retaining independence
item.description: Dramatic market changes in 2026 meant Afentra could raise finance to invest in Angola E&P activities

item.title: Two in race to provide offshore production unit at flagship asset
item.description: Technical and commercial offers for the mobile offshore production unit (MOPU) were recently submitted to ONGC

item.title: SBM lines up yards for TotalEnergies’ Venus FPSO as July FID nears
item.description: With TotalEnergies targeting FID in July FID, SBM has reserved yard slots across Asia for the Venus FPSO's hull and topsides

item.title: US oilfield service workforce expanded in May
item.description: More than 3600 positions were added on the back of higher oil and gas prices

item.title: Canadian LNG project moves forward with pending European deal
item.description: Ksi Lisims LNG attracts European interest despite its location on Canada's Pacific coast

item.title: ReconAfrica starts production tests on Namibia well
item.description: Results from onshore Owambo basin well due to be released by late July

item.title: Brazilian indie set to reach peak production at pre-salt field
item.description: Prio will produce about 40,000 bpd from Campos basin development

item.title: BP taps SLB OneSubsea for Thunder Horse workover
item.description: SLB's subsea tech unit will supply boosting equipment for BP's largest oil and gas platform
